textByHash.0e7132314a22d635d507ad4a43d57ac3985dad70: I have some items of yours here human. I'd recommend you collect them before returning to the lair.
textByHash.3b624db626a1320b54f4010ad4391e1061751455: I am here to protect it. For protecting it will protect the balance. I make sure that only those who have permission can fight it.
textByHash.641182fb411af3eed4ce86e86dee065721cd5053: I don't have anything for you human. If I did have any of your items, but you died before collecting them, they'll now be lost.
textByHash.9e3d98db515669d16876385074c1a540ca31f6ef: I do. I suppose you want them back.
textByHash.b0465bb1c09a52abe62dfd4151f0bf0bdcd34740: Human! To attack that creature would be a threat to the balance. Only those with permission may fight it!
textByHash.d933c4d670a86aa6dca8fb62dd93948313412cbe: This passage leads to the lair of what your kind call the Alchemical Hydra. It is an ancient beast, the only one of its kind.
textByHash.e662b07bd95e98e509e1171c4de22f70814fec83: I do not. If I did have any of your items, but you died before collecting them, they'll now be lost.
textByHash.fe3d8a7ed44fc316afb5a34ba45e3ed6f4281203: Only Konar quo Maten can grant permission to fight the Alchemical Hydra. She will rarely grant this permission when the beast needs calming.
